title: Proclamation No. 278, s. 1938
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 278

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL PURPOSES A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN, SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF TANATO, MUNICIPALITY OF BALANGA, PROVINCE OF BATAAN, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for school purposes, under the administration of the Director of Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcel of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Tanato, municipality of Balanga, Province of Bataan, Island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Mr-351, to wit:

Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Mr-351, S. 29° 39’ E. 1,140.82 m., more or less from B. B. M. No. 17, Balanga cadastre, thence N. 29° 11’ E. 175.34 m. to point 2; S. 63° 58’ E. 43.99 m. to point 3; S. 89° 08’ E. 58.33 m. to point 4; S. 71° 49’ e. 49.81 m. to point 5; S. 83° 21’ E. 72.73 m. to point 6; N. 67° 47’ E 60.84 m. to point 7; N. 44° 42’ E. 17.91 m. to point 8; N. 80° 41’ E. 12.86 m. to point 9; S. 56° 55’ E. 12.95 m. to point 10; S. 76° 57’ E. 56.76 m. to point 11; S. 56° 51’ E. 21.12 m. to point 12; S. 58° 20’ E. 12.76 m. to point 13; s. 49° 38’ E. 30.33 m. to point 14; S. 31° 21’ E. 68.00 m. to point 15; S. 12° 57’ E. 28.48 m. to point 16; S. 1° 24’ W. 40.24 m. to point 17; S. 21° 50’ W. 38.73 m. to point 18; S. 1° 00’ E. 30.78 m. to point 19; S. 6° 27’ E. 19.96 m. to point 20; S. 4° 03’ W. 52.62 m. to point 21; S. 67° 46’ W. 33.65 m. to point 22; S. 31° 42’ 18.10 m. to point 23; S. 8° 49’ W. 59.21 m. to point 24; N. 21° 37’ W. 27.18 m. to point 25; N. 51° 26’ W. 26.29 m. to point 26; N. 35° 58’ W. 40.55 m. to point 27; N. 66° 02’ W. 240.21 m. to point 28; N. 66° 02’ W. 223.38 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 12,3959 hectares.

Points 1 and 27, B. L. near trees; points 2, 5, 10 and 28, B. L. on stone monuments; and the rest are old stakes.

Bounded on the northeast, by road to Balanga and Tiawid river; on the east and southeast, by Tiawid river; on the southwest by creek 3.00 m. wide; and on the northwest, by public land and road to Balanga.

Bearings true. Declination 0° 53’ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Mr-351.

Surveyed: November 21-22, 1936.

Approved: June 21, 1937.

NOTE.—This is lot No. 2073 a portion of lot No. 1787 of Balanga cadastre No. 101, case No. 2.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this nineteenth day of July, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-eight, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the third.

[SEAL]

President of the Philippines

By the President:

Secretary to the President
